title: viola hirta var. pyrenaica
intro: Viola hirta var. pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean pansy or Alpine pansy, is a flowering plant species within the viola genus that is native to the Pyrenees Mountains. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola hirta var. pyrenaica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Viola hirta var. pyrenaica include tea infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to promote wound healing and calm the nervous system.
